---
title: "The Sigmoid Commercial System — At a Glance"
subtitle: "How the SCS governs our work"
---

**One page. Keep it open.** The full document is *The Sigmoid Commercial System*; this is the summary
the team works from.

## The core idea

> We exist to help organisations make **better commercial decisions through evidence.**
> Revenue, retention, and growth are all **outcomes of commercial decisions.**

A business is not a set of departments — it is a **living commercial system.**

## The five commercial questions

Everything we build, say, or measure serves one of these:
**Find · Win · Keep · Grow customers — and Decide better.**

## Commercial Health — what we measure

The leading indicator financial statements can't give you. Seven observable, improvable dimensions:

**Lead Quality · Sales Effectiveness · Relationship Quality · Customer Retention · Customer Growth ·
Revenue Predictability · Decision Quality.**

## The Commercial Learning Loop — how we improve it

```
Evidence → Insight → Decision → Action → Outcome → Learning → (better) Evidence
```

*Information tells us what happened; evidence explains why.* Businesses that learn faster improve
faster. Everything we build exists to make this loop turn faster and more honestly.

## Commercial Maturity — where a business is

**1 Reactive → 2 Organised → 3 Measured → 4 Evidence-Driven → 5 Commercial Intelligence.**
It's about *how decisions are made*, not company size or software spend.

## The ten principles

1. Businesses are commercial systems. 2. Every outcome is the result of previous decisions.
3. Better evidence → better decisions. 4. Better decisions → healthier businesses.
5. Customer relationships are measurable. 6. Follow-up is a competitive advantage.
7. AI should strengthen human judgement. 8. Revenue is earned through consistent execution.
9. Learning is a commercial capability. 10. **Evidence over opinion.**

## How everything inherits from the SCS

| We do… | …relationship to the system |
|---|---|
| **Sigmoid CRM** | implements the system |
| **Commercial Health / the Index** | measures the system |
| **Commercial Intelligence Lab** | evaluates decisions within the system |
| **Content** | teaches the system |
| **Consulting** | improves the system |
| **AI** | augments the system |
| **Research** | validates and evolves the system |

## The one test — for anything we build, write, or ship

> **Does this help someone make a better commercial decision?**
> If yes, it belongs at Sigmoid. If no, it doesn't.
